title: Simple Durability HUD
description: A lightweight Forge 1.20.1 HUD that displays durability for your armor and main hand item. Fully draggable and resizable.
body:
Here is a professional, high-quality English description for your Modrinth page. It’s designed to look clean, highlight your new features (RGB and Auto-save), and answer all user questions upfront.

🛠️ Simple Durability HUD
Never break your favorite gear by accident again! Simple Durability HUD adds a clear, easy-to-read durability counter to your screen. No more squinting at tiny bars or opening your inventory in the middle of a fight.

✨ Key Features:
🧩 Smart Dynamic Labels: The mod understands what’s in your hand!

"Blocks left" — for Pickaxes, Axes, and Shovels.

"Hits left" — for Swords and Weapons.

"Durability" — for Armor, Bows, and everything else.

🌈 Chroma & RGB Support: Customize your HUD with any color! Use the RGB keys to find your perfect look or enable the Rainbow Mode for a dynamic, shifting glow.

💾 Persistent Memory: Your settings are no longer temporary. The mod automatically creates a config file to save your position, scale, and colors forever. Set it once, keep it forever!

⚠️ Critical Warning: When an item drops below 10% durability, the text flashes white to make sure you notice before it’s too late!

⚙️ In-Game Customization (No Files Needed!):
Take full control of your interface without ever leaving the game:

Press [ O ] (default key) while in-world to open the editor.

Drag & Drop: Move the text with your mouse to any position on your screen.

Mouse Wheel: Scroll to change the Scale (size) of the HUD.

Keys [ 1, 2, 3 ]: Fine-tune your Red, Green, and Blue levels.

Key [ 4 ]: Toggle the legendary Rainbow Mode.

Press ESC: Your settings (your "Soul") will be saved automatically!

📦 Technical Requirements:
Version: Minecraft 1.20.1

Loader: Forge

Config File: config/durabilitymod-common.toml
